name: Cranberry Jello Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Grind the berries.
2. Add the orange rind and sugar to the ground berries. Let stand, stirring occasionally.
3. Heat the water and orange juice separately.
4. Dissolve the jello in the hot water mixture.
5. Allow the jello mixture to cool until it reaches room temperature.
6. Mix the cranberry blend, apples, and nuts into the cooled jello mixture.
7. Pour the mixture into a 2-quart mold.
8. Chill until set.
Serves 8-10.
